channel.title: Clojure, All on Squid's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Clojure, All on Squid's Blog

item.title: Embedded Interop between Clojure, R, and Python with GraalVM
item.description: In my talk at Clojure Conj I mentioned how a project from Oracle Labs named GraalVM might have to potential for Clojure to interop with Python on the same VM. At the time of the talk, I had just learned about it so I didn’t have time to take a look at it. Over the last week, I’ve managed to take it for a test drive and I wanted to share what I found.
